display.name: beta106i - Brilliance (Space-Time Breaking) - mash0000 - it's 2009 and you haven't replaced your analog tv with digital
display.author: beta106i

annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist preset displaying a single custom wave configured as a closed radial loop. The radial displacement of the vertex points is modulated directly by the frequency bands of the synthetic test signal, creating a simple oscilloscope-like deformation. With decay set to maximum and no feedback sampler (sampler_main) blending, the screen remains a stark black void while the line and border colors cycle through primary hues.
